final:
module ALU(
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input [1:0] control,
    output reg [15:0] invalid_result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (control)
            2'b00: invalid_result = A + B;      // Addition
            2'b01: invalid_result = A - B;      // Subtraction
            2'b10: invalid_result = A & B;      // AND
            2'b11: invalid_result = A | B;      // OR
            default: invalid_result = 16'b0;     // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
